# analyticsadmin_datastreams (Data Source)

List all datastreams for a property_id



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `property_id` (String) The Google Analytics property

### Optional

- `data_streams` (Attributes List) Ouput: The list of data  that will be excluded from exports (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--data_streams))

<a id="nestedatt--data_streams"></a>
### Nested Schema for `data_streams`

Optional:

- `display_name` (String)

Read-Only:

- `name` (String)
- `type` (String)
